title: Seed Sourcing Grant: how to make a claim
body: "If you have an SSG agreement in place, use the how to claim guidance to help you submit your report and claim your project expenditure.  The guidance outlines the steps you need to follow, including completing the claim form, gathering the necessary evidence and submitting your documents to the Forestry Commission.  The SSG is closed for new applications. Find out more about our other grants for trees and woodland. "
